description: Extend MSP SSO domain persistence model with lifecycle states supporting EE verification and CE advisory modes.
Add optional domain verification challenge storage for EE ownership checks.
Backfill existing domain rows to deterministic lifecycle defaults for EE and CE.
Add shared domain lifecycle normalization/validation helpers used by settings actions and discovery logic.
Add EE permission-gated action to list SSO domain claims with lifecycle metadata.
Add EE action to request domain claim and create verification challenge.
Add EE action to refresh/regenerate verification challenge material.
Add EE action to verify domain ownership and promote claim to verified.
Add EE action to revoke verified domain takeover.
Add CE advisory domain registration save/remove path without mandatory ownership proof.
Enforce conflict policy so only one EE tenant can hold a verified claim for a domain.
Update EE provider settings UI to show domain claim lifecycle states and available actions.
Show EE domain verification challenge instructions and status feedback in settings UI.
Update CE settings UI to expose advisory domain registration with explicit advisory copy.
Update settings copy to state that unmanaged domains use Nine Minds app-level fallback providers.
Update discovery helper to evaluate edition + domain claim lifecycle before selecting tenant/app source.
In EE discovery, allow tenant-scoped providers only for verified non-ambiguous domain claims.
In EE discovery, route pending/rejected/revoked/ambiguous claims to app-level fallback providers.
In CE discovery, treat advisory registrations as eligible for tenant routing without ownership verification gate.
In both editions, unresolved/unregistered domains return app-level fallback provider set.
Keep discover endpoint invariant response contract and anti-enumeration behavior while adding lifecycle checks.
Update resolver source selection to enforce lifecycle-aware eligibility at resolve time.
Maintain resolver generic failure response contract for invalid, disallowed, or stale-eligibility scenarios.
Preserve signed, secret-safe discovery/resolution cookie usage with lifecycle-aware payload consumption.
Keep MSP credentials login flow unchanged after takeover lifecycle integration.
Keep client portal login and auth affordances unchanged.
Wire CE MSP login to use discovery-enabled SSO button implementation instead of null/stub behavior.
Ensure MSP login forms pass typed email into SSO discovery component in both CE and EE builds.
Retain current SSO button interaction patterns (disabled states, in-flight behavior, remembered provider) with new routing matrix.
Document EE domain takeover lifecycle and verification runbook for tenant admins.
Document CE advisory mode behavior and limitations.
Document Nine Minds app-level fallback prerequisites and behavior for unmanaged/unapproved domains.
Add unit and contract coverage for EE/CE domain lifecycle actions and permission guards.
Add discovery/resolver matrix test coverage for EE verified/unverified/ambiguous and CE advisory/unregistered paths.
Preserve `/auth/msp/signin` and callbackUrl passthrough contracts under the new takeover lifecycle behavior.
